news.title:
Nippon India Mutual Fund resumes subscription for its international funds from March 18, 2026.
Investors can invest via lumpsum, switch-ins, and new SIPs in these schemes.
news.summary:
Nippon India Mutual Fund resumes subscription for its international funds from March 18, 2026.
Investors can invest via lumpsum, switch-ins, and new SIPs in these schemes.

news.title: DWS Gmbh signs agreements to acquire a 40% stake in Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd.
news.summary: DWS Gmbh signs agreements to acquire a 40% stake in Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd.

news.title:
Nippon Life India AM board approves DWS acquiring 40% stake in NAIF for INR 733.4 crore.
NAIF contributed 4.6% to revenue, 3.1% to net worth; deal awaits SEBI, CCI approvals.
news.summary:
Nippon Life India AM board approves DWS acquiring 40% stake in NAIF for INR 733.4 crore.
NAIF contributed 4.6% to revenue, 3.1% to net worth; deal awaits SEBI, CCI approvals.

news.title:
Mutual fund folios rose by 7.1M in January, with Tata, Nippon, and HDFC seeing over 1M additions.
Nippon's gold fund inflows of ₹911.7M and growing SIP adoption boosted investor participation.
news.summary:
Mutual fund folios rose by 7.1M in January, with Tata, Nippon, and HDFC seeing over 1M additions.
Nippon's gold fund inflows of ₹911.7M and growing SIP adoption boosted investor participation.

news.title:
Nippon India Mutual Fund announces change in fund managers for several schemes effective 16 Feb 2026.
Schemes affected include Nippon India Quant Fund, Multi Cap Fund, and Active Momentum Fund.
news.summary:
Nippon India Mutual Fund announces change in fund managers for several schemes effective 16 Feb 2026.
Schemes affected include Nippon India Quant Fund, Multi Cap Fund, and Active Momentum Fund.

news.title:
Debt mutual funds saw net inflows in January after two months of outflows.
Experts attribute this to year-end cash deployment and renewed investor interest.
news.summary:
Debt mutual funds saw net inflows in January after two months of outflows.
Experts attribute this to year-end cash deployment and renewed investor interest.

news.title:
India's debt-to-GDP ratio is projected to drop to 55.6% in FY27, signaling fiscal consolidation, which could attract foreign investors.
The Supreme Court's Tiger Global tax ruling has raised concerns among foreign investors about India's tax regime predictability.
news.summary:
India's debt-to-GDP ratio is projected to drop to 55.6% in FY27, signaling fiscal consolidation, which could attract foreign investors.
The Supreme Court's Tiger Global tax ruling has raised concerns among foreign investors about India's tax regime predictability.

news.title:
Nippon Life India Asset Management reports 23% YoY AUM growth to INR 8.16 trillion.
The company aims for expansion through strategic partnerships.
news.summary:
Nippon Life India Asset Management reports 23% YoY AUM growth to INR 8.16 trillion.
The company aims for expansion through strategic partnerships.

news.title:
NAM India Q3 FY26 profit rose 36.7% YoY to ₹403.9 cr; revenue grew 20% to ₹705.3 cr.
AUM hit ₹8.16 tn with 77% digital transactions; shares closed at ₹861, up 3.1% on NSE.
news.summary:
NAM India Q3 FY26 profit rose 36.7% YoY to ₹403.9 cr; revenue grew 20% to ₹705.3 cr.
AUM hit ₹8.16 tn with 77% digital transactions; shares closed at ₹861, up 3.1% on NSE.

news.title:
Nippon Life India Asset Management reported Q3 revenue of ₹1,834Cr and profit of ₹1,115Cr.
Reappointed Independent Director, disclosed SEBI show cause notice, and ₹189.9Cr IPO proceeds remain unutilized.
news.summary:
Nippon Life India Asset Management reported Q3 revenue of ₹1,834Cr and profit of ₹1,115Cr.
Reappointed Independent Director, disclosed SEBI show cause notice, and ₹189.9Cr IPO proceeds remain unutilized.

news.title:
Nippon India Gold, Silver ETFs surpass ₹1 lakh cr as precious metals gain traction.
Investors in mutual funds may already have exposure to these ETFs.
news.summary:

news.title:
Nippon India Mutual Fund sets 29 Jan 2026 as record date for IDCW.
Distribution: Power Infra Fund Regular Plan Rs 4.5/unit, Direct Plan Rs 5/unit.
news.summary:

news.title:
Passive investing gains momentum in India with ETFs rivaling large-cap equities in liquidity.
On Jan 21, gold and silver ETFs outperformed several frontline stocks in trading value.

The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 53.4 crores.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC's market cap rose ₹18b last week, benefiting public companies most (47% ownership).
Grasim Industries holds 45% stake; insiders own under 1%. Institutions gained 40% from last week's 8.2% price rise.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC's market cap rose ₹18b last week, benefiting public companies most (47% ownership).
Grasim Industries holds 45% stake; insiders own under 1%. Institutions gained 40% from last week's 8.2% price rise.

news.title:
Nippon Life India Asset Management saw a block trade of 1,006,327 shares.
The trade was priced at Rs. 886.4 per share, totaling Rs. 89.2 crore.

news.title:
HDB Financial Services' ownership includes 74% by HDFC Bank, 14% by individual investors.
Institutional investors, including Nippon Life (1.8%) and Kotak Mahindra (1.5%), also hold stakes.

news.title:
Fund managers argue IPO investments like Lenskart's should focus on unitholder value over valuations.
They defend high-valuation IPO bets, emphasizing broader investment context and potential returns.

news.title:
Nippon Life India Asset Management fell 2.3% on 05 Dec, closing at 814.5.
The drop reflects short-term pressures despite strong fundamentals and benchmark outperformance.
news.summary:

news.title:
Mutual fund cash holdings surged 29% in October, rising by Rs 95,971.58 crore to Rs 4.27 lakh crore, driven by debt inflows.
Top fund houses like ICICI Prudential, Nippon India, and Axis Mutual Fund contributed Rs 8,391-22,566 crore each to the increase.
news.summary:
Mutual fund cash holdings surged 29% in October, rising by Rs 95,971.58 crore to Rs 4.27 lakh crore, driven by debt inflows.
Top fund houses like ICICI Prudential, Nippon India, and Axis Mutual Fund contributed Rs 8,391-22,566 crore each to the increase.
